stemHtml: Minimum V2 speed (V2MIN) is limited by both the stall speed (VSR) and minimum control speed (VMC). Which statement is correct?

options.a: At high density altitudes and high weight, V2MIN is often limited by the speed for minimum control (VMC).
options.b: V<sub>2MIN</sub> cannot be lower than the highest of 1.05 times V<sub>MC</sub> and 1.2 times V<sub>SR</sub>.
options.c: V<sub>2MIN</sub> is calculated with all engines operating, for flight with one engine inoperative, another safety speed must be used.
options.d: At high density altitudes and high weight, V2MIN is often limited by the stall reference speed (VSR).
